\usepackage{titlesec}
\usepackage{enumitem}

\setlength{\parindent}{0pt}
\setlength{\parskip}{2pt}
\setlength{\columnsep}{14pt}
\setlength{\emergencystretch}{4em}
\raggedbottom

\setlist[itemize]{leftmargin=1.1em,itemsep=0.5pt,topsep=1.5pt,parsep=0pt,partopsep=0pt}
\setlist[enumerate]{leftmargin=1.2em,itemsep=0.5pt,topsep=1.5pt,parsep=0pt,partopsep=0pt}

\titleformat{\section}
  {\normalfont\bfseries\normalsize}
  {}
  {0pt}
  {}

\titleformat{\subsection}
  {\normalfont\bfseries\small\scshape}
  {}
  {0pt}
  {}

\titleformat{\subsubsection}[runin]
  {\normalfont\bfseries\small}
  {}
  {0pt}
  {}
  [.]

\titlespacing*{\section}{0pt}{2pt}{3pt}
\titlespacing*{\subsection}{0pt}{2pt}{2pt}
\titlespacing*{\subsubsection}{0pt}{1pt}{0.4em}

\makeatletter
\renewcommand{\maketitle}{}
\makeatother

% longtable is incompatible with twocolumn mode; redefine it as a minipage+tabular
% so that the Change Log and tools-disclosure tables render correctly in form PDFs.
\renewenvironment{longtable}[2][c]{%
  \par\noindent\begin{minipage}{\columnwidth}%
  \small%
  \begin{tabular}{#2}%
}{%
  \end{tabular}%
  \end{minipage}\par%
}
\def\endhead{}
\def\endfirsthead{}
\def\endfoot{}
\def\endlastfoot{}
